heading: Compensation of President pro tempore of Senate
label: 6111 Compensation of President pro tempore of Senate
text: Whenever there is no Vice President, the President of the Senate for the time being is entitled to the compensation provided by law for the Vice President.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 32 of this titleR.S. § 36 derived from , .act Aug. 16, 1856, ch. 123, § 211 Stat. 48
